meta_title: For Founders: design with AI to Solve no portfolio (Beginner Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to design with AI and overcome no portfolio. A Beginner-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Design with AI to Solve No Portfolio
content.seo_description: Learn how to design with AI and overcome no portfolio. A Beginner-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code to launch your SaaS MVP fast.
content.answer_block: Building a portfolio from scratch is a bottleneck for founders. By leveraging AI-driven design tools like Antigravity and Claude Code, you can generate high-fidelity, functional prototypes in hours, not weeks. This approach shifts your focus from manual pixel-pushing to rapid feature iteration, proving value to early customers immediately.
content.intro:
The blank page is the founder’s greatest adversary. You have a vision for a SaaS product that solves a real market pain, but you are paralyzed by the 'no portfolio' trap—the catch-22 where you need clients to show work, but you need work to get clients. 

Stop waiting for the perfect moment. We are entering an era where technical barriers are collapsing. Using Antigravity for rapid UI assembly and Claude Code for intelligent scaffolding, you can transform abstract ideas into polished, revenue-ready interfaces. This is how you bypass the gatekeepers and build authority through execution.

steps.title: Define the Value Proposition
steps.description: Before designing, codify your SaaS business logic. Identify the core user flow that delivers the 'Aha!' moment.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a high-converting landing page structure for a B2B SaaS tool that solves [INSERT PROBLEM]. Include sections for hero, social proof, and pricing.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Generate a marketing site structure based on the provided business logic.'

steps.title: Generate the Design System
steps.description: Establish a professional look and feel. Consistent design is the difference between a prototype and a product.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a modern, minimalist design system (Tailwind CSS) with a primary color of #4F46E5, focusing on high contrast and accessibility.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Initialize a Tailwind CSS config and theme file for a clean SaaS aesthetic.'

steps.title: Build the MVP Core Components
steps.description: Focus on the functional UI components. Avoid over-engineering; build only what the user interacts with.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Build a responsive dashboard sidebar and a main content area component using React and Tailwind CSS.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Generate a React component library for the core dashboard layout.'

steps.title: Integrate Data Flow
steps.description: Use Claude Code to mock your backend responses so the UI feels alive and functional.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a mock data service that simulates an API response for user analytics.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Create a mock data service and inject it into the dashboard components.'

steps.title: Deploy and Iterate
steps.description: Push your prototype to a live environment to gather feedback. Speed is your primary metric.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Optimize the project for deployment on Vercel, including necessary build settings.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Prepare the project for deployment and generate the build script.'

pro_tips: Prioritize 'perceived speed'—animate your loading states; it makes your app feel 10x more premium.
Always use a consistent design token system; AI struggles with context if your CSS class names are inconsistent.
Focus on the 'Happy Path' first; don't spend time on edge-case error handling until you have your first user.
Use Claude Code to document your components as you build; it forces you to clarify your architecture.
Treat your UI code as a living document; if it isn't serving a business goal, delete it.
content.next_steps: Once your prototype is live, share it with five potential users in your niche. Gather feedback, iterate using your new AI workflow, and start building your real-world portfolio.
content.conversion_block: You now have the technical blueprint to build a professional-grade MVP without needing a traditional agency or a massive team. The market doesn't care about your resume; it cares about the problem you solve. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
